title: Quantum Reservoir Computing: Core Concepts
description: Discover how quantum systems naturally implement reservoir computing, leveraging quantum dynamics, superposition, and entanglement for enhanced temporal processing capabilities.
learningObjectives: Understand how quantum dynamics implement reservoir computing
Explain the role of quantum features: superposition and entanglement
Design quantum reservoir architectures for different tasks
Compare quantum vs classical reservoir capacities
Identify advantages of quantum reservoirs for specific problems
